zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Swinburne於大約1285年出生在英國諾圖波藍德卡亞頓時，他的父親Sir Alexander Swinburne27歲，母親Agnes Thornhill23歲。他於1304年與Alice de Vaux在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於從1354年1月9日到1355年1月8日在英國諾圖波藍德吉可惠爾平頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Swinburne于大约1285年出生在英国諾圖波藍德卡亞頓时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Swinburne27岁，母亲Agnes Thornhill23岁。他于1304年与Alice de Vaux在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于从1354年1月9日到1355年1月8日在英国諾圖波藍德吉可惠爾平頓。

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Swinburne was born about 1285, in Capheaton, Northumberland, England, his father, Sir Alexander Swinburne, was 27 and his mother, Agnes Thornhill, was 23. He married Alice de Vaux in 1304, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died from 9 January 1354 to 8 January 1355, in Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Swinburne est né environ 1285, à Capheaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander Swinburne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Thornhill, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Vaux en 1304, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé du 9 janvier 1354 au 8 janvier 1355, à Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Swinburne um 1285 in Capheaton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Swinburne 27 und seine Mutter Agnes Thornhill 23. Er hat 1304 in Northumberland, England Alice de Vaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb von 9. Januar 1354 bis 8. Januar 1355 in Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Swinburne è nato il circa 1285 nel Capheaton, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Swinburne, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Thornhill, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Vaux nel 1304, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì da 9 gennaio 1354 a 8 gennaio 1355, nel Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Swinburneが約1285年にイギリスノースウンバーランドカフエアトンで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Swinburneは27歳，母Agnes Thornhillは23歳であった。1304年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでAlice de Vauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はから1354年1月9日まで1355年1月8日にイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクウエルパントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Swinburne(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 노르스벌랜드 캡히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Swinburne(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Thornhill(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1304년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Alice de Vaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1354년 1월 9일부터 1355년 1월 8일까지 영국 노르스벌랜드 커크화핀그턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Swinburne nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Capheaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alexander Swinburne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Thornhill, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Vaux em 1304, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu de 9 de janeiro de 1354 a 8 de janeiro de 1355, em Kirkwhelpington, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Swinburne родился около 1285 г. в местности кафитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Swinburne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Thornhill, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Vaux в 1304 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер с 9 января 1354 по 8 января 1355 в местности киркуелпингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия.
